dropdown.loginPrompt: Sign in to view orders, favourites and settings

hero.title: Regal confidence. Sculpted femininity.
hero.subtitle: A curated wardrobe of deliberate silhouettes, tactile fabrics, and couture-grade finishing—built for women who collect details as art.
hero.caption: Editorial frame placeholder — drop your hero visual here.

philosophy.title: Brand Philosophy
philosophy.text: We believe in the power of a perfectly tailored silhouette to transform not just how you look, but how you move through the world. Every piece is designed to last — not just seasons, but years. Crafted with intention, finished by hand, meant to be treasured. REINASLEO is for women who understand that true luxury lives in the details others might miss.
statements: We believe in the power of a perfectly tailored silhouette to transform not just how you look, but how you move through the world.
Every piece is designed to last—not just seasons, but years. Crafted with intention, finished by hand, meant to be treasured.
REINASLEO is for women who understand that true luxury lives in the details others might miss.

editorialCard.quote: Luxury lies in the details you feel, not the ones you see.
editorialCard.label: Our Story
editorialCard.title: Behind the Atelier
editorialCard.description: How each piece comes to life — from the first sketch to the final stitch. A journey where nothing is left to chance.

silhouette.title: Silhouette
silhouette.body: Architected lines that honor the body—elongated proportions, sculpted waists, poised structure without stiffness.

details.title: Details
details.body: French seams, hand-tacked linings, custom-dyed trims. Every edge is considered to feel intimate and intentional.

craft.title: Craft
craft.body: Small-batch atelier production with couture-influenced finishing. Made to last, made to feel personal.

atelier.title: A quiet, disciplined atelier for women who notice everything.
atelier.body: REINASLEO collections are assembled in focused capsules—allowing time for fabric testing, pattern refinements, and hand-finishing. Each release is meant to be lived in, layered, and treasured.

fabric.title: Fabric
bullets: Custom dye baths in house palette

newsletter.title: Quiet drops, first access.
newsletter.body: Receive atelier release notes, fitting invitations, and new collection drops. No noise—just the essentials.
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive updates and consent to data processing.

about.title: REINASLEO is an editorial lens on modern femininity.
about.body: Founded to bridge couture techniques with contemporary practicality, REINASLEO curates tightly edited capsules. Each piece is designed to hold structure, move with grace, and photograph beautifully. We obsess over tactile contrasts—crisp wovens against fluid drape, matte suiting beside luminous silk.
about.note: This is a placeholder page. Expand with atelier photography, founder notes, and process imagery.

product.deliveryBody: Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Free returns within 30 days of purchase. Items must be unworn with tags attached.

collections.title: Seasonal Collections
collections.subtitle: Each season tells its own story through fabric, silhouette, and color.

winter.name: Winter Collection
winter.description: Structured warmth — wool coats, cashmere layers, and evening silhouettes for the coldest months.

spring.name: Spring Collection
spring.description: Light transitions — flowing blouses, tailored trousers, and soft palettes for the new season.

summer.name: Summer Collection
summer.description: Effortless movement — silk dresses, linen tops, and resort-ready pieces for warm days.

autumn.name: Autumn Collection
autumn.description: Rich textures — midi skirts, knit cardigans, and tailored suits in deep seasonal tones.

sections.heading: 1. General Provisions
sections.body: This Privacy Policy describes how REINASLEO ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use our website and services. By accessing our website, you agree to the terms outlined in this policy.

sections.heading: 2. Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect the following types of personal data: name, email address, phone number, delivery address, order history, browsing behavior on our website, and Telegram account information if you choose to link it. Data is collected when you create an account, place an order, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
sections.body: Your personal data is used to process and fulfil orders, provide customer support, send newsletters and promotional offers (with your consent), improve our website and services, prevent fraud, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.heading: 4. Data Storage and Security
sections.body: Your data is stored on secure servers within the European Economic Area. We employ industry-standard encryption, access controls, and regular security audits to protect your information. Data is retained for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with payment processors to complete transactions, delivery services to fulfil orders, analytics providers to improve our services, and law enforcement when required by law. All third parties are contractually bound to protect your data.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, restrict or object to data processing, request data portability, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@reinasleo.com.

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
sections.body: Our website uses essential cookies required for basic functionality, analytics cookies to understand how visitors use our site, and preference cookies to remember your settings. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

sections.heading: 8. Policy Changes
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of our services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 1. General Provisions
sections.body: These Terms of Service govern your use of the REINASLEO website and services. By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: 2. Registration and Account
sections.body: To place orders and access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account. You agree to provide accurate and complete information during registration.

sections.heading: 3. Rules of Use
sections.body: You agree not to use our website for any unlawful purpose, interfere with the operation of the website, upload malicious content, attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems, or use automated tools to scrape or collect data without our prior written consent.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website — including designs, photographs, text, logos, and graphics — is the property of REINASLEO or its licensors and is protected by copyright and trademark laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our explicit permission.

sections.heading: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: REINASLEO provides the website and services "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services.

sections.heading: 6. Orders and Payments
sections.body: All orders are subject to availability and confirmation. Prices are displayed in euros and include applicable taxes. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders in cases of pricing errors, suspected fraud, or stock unavailability. Payment is processed securely through our authorized payment providers.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes take effect upon posting to the website. Your continued use of our services after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. We encourage you to review these terms regularly.

sections.heading: 8. Contact Information
sections.body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at hello@reinasleo.com. For legal inquiries, you may also reach us by post at our registered office address.

philosophy.title: Brand Philosophy
philosophy.heading: In short
philosophy.body1: We make premium womenswear where quality is visible and comfort is felt. No slogans — just pieces that work in real life.
philosophy.body2: Every design starts with fit: silhouette, balance, fabric, and hardware — everything in its right place.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.text: Freedom in movement and rhythm of the day.

honestCut.title: Honest cut
honestCut.text: The silhouette works with the figure, not against it.

longevity.title: Longevity
longevity.text: Pieces that stay in the wardrobe for years.
